potions.name: Healing Potion
potions.description: A red liquid that restores 10 HP when consumed.

potions.name: Healing Potion +
potions.description: A red liquid that restores 20 HP when consumed.

potions.name: Healing Potion ++
potions.description: A red liquid that restores 33 HP when consumed.

potions.name: Healing Potion +++
potions.description: A red liquid that restores 50 HP when consumed.

potions.name: Mana Potion
potions.description: A blue liquid that restores 15 mana when consumed.

potions.name: Mana Potion +
potions.description: A blue liquid that restores 30 mana when consumed.

potions.name: Strength Potion
potions.description: A fiery liquid that temporarily increases strength by 10 for 30 seconds.

potions.name: Swiftness Potion
potions.description: A green liquid that temporarily increases dexterity by 10 for 30 seconds.

potions.name: Iron Hide Potion
potions.description: A grey liquid that temporarily increases constitution by 10 for 30 seconds.
